title: Penalty
doc_html:
§1703.  Penalty

Whoever violates the provisions of R.S. 37:1701 or 37:1702, shall be fined not less than five dollars nor more than twenty-five dollars, or imprisoned for not less than ten days nor more than thirty days, or both.
doc_text:
§1703.  Penalty
Whoever violates the provisions of R.S. 37:1701 or 37:1702, shall be fined not less than five dollars nor more than twenty-five dollars, or imprisoned for not less than ten days nor more than thirty days, or both.
